title: Longest Common Subsequence
hints: Consider comparing characters from the end of both strings. What happens if they match versus if they differ?
This problem has optimal substructure and overlapping subproblems, making dynamic programming a natural fit.
Define dp[i][j] as the LCS length for text1[i:] and text2[j:]. The recurrence depends on whether text1[i] equals text2[j].
